name: aurora-ask-user-question
title: Aurora Ask User Question
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Assistant question block with radio, multi-select, or free-text input. Option cards feature hover accent-border glow and active-glow on selection. Supports optional code preview panel per option.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora Ask User Question.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-textarea`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ask-user-question.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-textarea`, `aurora-components`.
